title: AI Royalty Audit
subtitle: Automatic reconciliation between your actual streams and the amounts reported by platforms, collection societies and labels.

hero.label: Recoverable amount detected
hero.findings: {count, plural, =0 {No gap detected} one {# gap detected} other {# gaps detected}}

letter.dialogSubtitle: Pre-drafted by AI from your data. Review and adapt before sending.
letter.subject: Subject: royalty verification request — period {period}
letter.body1: Following the automatic reconciliation between our certified consumption data and your statement for the period {period}, we have identified a significant discrepancy between the expected amount ({expected}) and the reported amount ({reported}).
letter.body2: The identified gap amounts to {gap}. Our reconciliation model — cross-referencing observed streams per platform, applicable contractual rates and payment history — establishes this finding with a confidence level of {confidence}.
letter.body3: We kindly ask you to carry out a detailed verification of the period in question, to provide us with the details of the bases and calculations applied and, where applicable, to proceed with the corresponding adjustment payment.
letter.signoff: Awaiting your response within 30 days, we remain at your disposal for any further information.

method.title: How the audit works
method.subtitle: A systematic reconciliation, not a back-of-the-envelope estimate.
method.step1Desc: DSP statements, collection societies, neighboring rights and label reports are normalized into a single reference.
method.step2Desc: The model cross-references observed streams, per-platform rates and contractual clauses to estimate the expected amount.
method.step3Desc: Each gap is weighted by source data quality and the historical stability of payments.
method.step4Desc: A verification request letter is pre-drafted, ready to review and send. Status is tracked here.
method.disclaimer: Demo data — expected amounts are model estimates, not certain claims.

label.artistsWithFindings: {count, plural, one {# artist affected} other {# artists affected}}

empty.title: No gap detected
empty.hint: Your statements match the streams observed over the analyzed period.
